summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: Nothing's flagging right now — your knees, joints, shoulders, neck, all the spots you tend to watch are quiet and ready. You're the kind of guy who builds back through steady, repeatable effort rather than dramatic highs and lows, and this morning lines up with that perfectly: you slept clean, you woke up settled, and the tank's got real room in it. Day's wide open with plenty to spend.

Performance: Train normally. You came in a notch above your usual and your system feels calm, so it's a solid green light — go after the work without forcing anything.

Transit: none
